word_list.word: a dog is man's best friend
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ dˈɑːɡ ɪz mˈænz bˈɛst fɹˈɛnd

senses.definition: used to refer to the strong and loyal bond between dogs and humans, and their ability to provide comfort, companionship, and protection

word_list.word: a friend in need is a friend indeed
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ fɹˈɛnd ɪn nˈiːd ɪz ɐ fɹˈɛnd ˌɪndˈiːd

senses.definition: used to imply that a true friend is someone who supports and helps one during difficult times, showing their loyalty and trustworthiness

word_list.word: a man is known by the company he keeps
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ mˈæn ɪz nˈoʊn baɪ ðə kˈʌmpəni hiː kˈiːps

senses.definition: used to imply that a person's character and reputation can be influenced by the qualities and behavior of their friends and associates
used to imply that a true friend is someone who is considerate and respectful of their friends' feelings, avoiding actions or words that could be hurtful or damaging to the relationship

word_list.word: all men's friend (is|,) no man's friend
word_list.pronunciation: ˈɔːl mˈɛnz fɹˈɛnd ɪz ɔːɹ nˈoʊ mˈænz fɹˈɛnd

senses.definition: used to suggest that someone who tries to be friends with everyone is not truly a loyal friend to anyone, as they may not prioritize any one person's needs or interests over another's

word_list.word: you can choose your friends but you cannot choose your family
word_list.pronunciation: juː kæn tʃˈuːz jʊɹ fɹˈɛndz bˌʌt juː kænˈɑːt tʃˈuːz jʊɹ fˈæmɪli

senses.definition: used to imply that one has the freedom to choose one's friends, but not one's family, emphasizing the need to accept and navigate familial relationships with patience

word_list.word: a broken friendship may be soldered but will never be sound
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ bɹˈoʊkən fɹˈɛndʃɪp mˈeɪ biː sˈɑːdɚd bˌʌt wɪl nˈɛvɚ biː sˈaʊnd

senses.definition: used to suggest that repairing a damaged friendship or relationship is possible, but it will never be as strong and reliable as before due to lingering mistrust or resentment

word_list.word: a hedge between keeps friendship green
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ hˈɛdʒ bɪtwˌiːn kˈiːps fɹˈɛndʃɪp ɡɹˈiːn

senses.definition: used to suggest that having boundaries and some privacy in a friendship can help to maintain its health and longevity, as it can prevent conflict and strain

word_list.word: a friend to all is a friend to none
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ fɹˈɛnd tʊ ˈɔːl ɪz ɐ fɹˈɛnd tə nˈʌn

senses.definition: used to imply that a person who tries to be friends with everyone often lacks genuine loyalty and deep connections, as true friendship requires personal investment and a certain level of exclusivity

word_list.word: friendship is like money, easier made than kept
word_list.pronunciation: fɹˈɛndʃɪp ɪz lˈaɪk mˈʌni ˈiːzɪɚ mˌeɪd ðɐn kˈɛpt

senses.definition: used to imply that while it is easy to form new friendships, maintaining them over time requires effort and investment

word_list.word: better lose a jest than a friend
word_list.phonetic_text: bɛ.tɜr lu:z ə ʤɛst ðæn ə frɛnd
word_list.phonetic_am_text: be.tēr looz ē jest dhān ē frend
word_list.pronunciation: bˈɛɾɚ lˈuːz ɐ dʒˈɛst ðˌænə fɹˈɛnd

senses.definition: used to imply that it is better to avoid making a joke that might offend a friend and risk damaging the friendship

word_list.word: be slow in choosing a friend, but slower in changing him
word_list.pronunciation: biː slˈoʊ ɪn tʃˈuːzɪŋ ɐ fɹˈɛnd bˌʌt slˈoʊɚɹ ɪn tʃˈeɪndʒɪŋ hˌɪm

senses.definition: used to advise one to be cautious and deliberate in choosing friends, but to be loyal and patient with them once they are chosen

word_list.word: lend your money and lose your friend
word_list.phonetic_text: lɛnd jɔr mʌ.ni ænd lu:z jɔr frɛnd
word_list.phonetic_am_text: lend yawr ma.ni ānd looz yawr frend
word_list.pronunciation: lˈɛnd jʊɹ mˈʌni ænd lˈuːz jʊɹ fɹˈɛnd

senses.definition: used to suggest that lending money to a friend can strain the relationship and potentially lead to the loss of the friendship

examples.x: Jane was hesitant to lend money to her friend, as she had heard the saying lend your money and lose your friend, and didn't want to risk her friendship.

senses.definition: used to suggest that even close friends can sometimes cause harm or trouble, and it is important to be cautious and protect oneself from negative consequences
